hooks.command: if [ -f .context/STATE.md ]; then echo '=== .context/ continuity protocol is active in this project ==='; echo 'Before doing anything else, invoke the "session" skill to check in. The store below is the truth; your private conversation history is not enough.'; echo ''; echo '=== .context/STATE.md ==='; cat .context/STATE.md; echo ''; echo '=== .context/LOG.md (top 80 lines) ==='; head -80 .context/LOG.md; fi

if [ -f .context/STATE.md ]; then echo 'REMINDER (.context/ protocol): Before this session truly ends, invoke the "session" skill to check out. Update STATE, append a LOG entry, and commit .context/. Without this, the next agent picks up blind.'; fi
